title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
slides: Notion Mail is gone. What took its place?
The team shifted to building AI agents instead.
They never even launched a beta to users.
Your inbox won't got smarter through Notion.
Check if your tools are pivoting without you.
thread_text:
1. They vanished overnight

The Notion Mail team never launched a beta. They just stopped and started building AI agents instead.

2. From inbox to agent

Notion Mail was supposed to make your email smarter. The project died before a single user touched it.

3. The signal went dark

Your tools can pivot without warning. No beta, no announcement — just a shift you only learn about later.

4. Who else is hiding?

If Notion Mail could die in silence, which other product promises are already fading? The roadmaps you trust may be ghosts.

5. Check your stack today

Open your most-used tool's blog or changelog. Search for "AI agent" or "pivot." If you see silence, that's your answer.
video_script: The team built AI agents instead.
They never let users try it.
Check if your tools pivoted too.

script: The team built AI agents instead.

instagram.caption:
You opened Notion to plan your day; behind the scenes, the team building Mail had already moved on.  

No beta was ever released. Notion Mail disappeared into the product graveyard to build AI agents instead.  

The smart-inbox promise you read about never got off the drawing board.  

What tool in your stack has already changed course without sending you a notification? 🔇
